message:
style: rustfmt long-line reformatting in pool.rs and h3_native.rs

src/database/pool.rs: break Duration::from_nanos(deadline.duration_since())
across multiple lines

src/http/h3_native.rs: break max_contiguous_finished_request_stream_id
chain across multiple lines, replace trailing whitespace with clean newlines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
